product_results.title: New Balance Mens 997H V1 Sneaker Sneaker

summary.text: Customers find these shoes super comfortable and never disappointed with comfort and quality. They describe the shoes as good quality and very stylish with a timeless style. The shoes are appreciated for being supportive and versatile, with customers satisfied with the color options. However, opinions are mixed regarding the fit and durability of the shoes.

authors_reviews.title: great kick - handle it !!! great for all fits
authors_reviews.text: this is one of the best shoes you can get ! very comfy and have wide sizes - lots of colors to fit a plethora of fits, great for all casual situations. has a really good heel cup for support and you don't fall out of the shoe or "over pronate " or "supinate". solid kick !!! highly recommended !
authors_reviews.author: Sherlan John

authors_reviews.title: Very comfortable shoes
authors_reviews.text: I bought this twice before finding the perfect size in my third purchase. Bought size 5.5 initially which is what I usually buy in men size, as I am a size 7 in women. But they were too tight. I bought them a second time in size 6.5 wide, but they were too big and long.And finally a third purchase in size 6 fit perfect and comfortable. They are cute and very very comfy. No rubbing issues or blisters. The neutral gray color makes them go with everything too. And the N and the back of the shoes shine in darkness. Happy purchase! And also Im the definition of never give up😂
authors_reviews.author: ketura J.

authors_reviews.title: Great shoes. Classic design. Well made.
authors_reviews.text: Excellent shoe. Classic design. This is my 4th pair over almost 20 yrs.Would recommend. Roomy toe box.
authors_reviews.author: Andrew

authors_reviews.title: Comfortable and classic, but be careful in rain
authors_reviews.text: These New Balance 574s in black and white (size 11) fit perfect and feel great—no break-in needed. Classic look, solid comfort.New Balance does warn about color bleeding if they get wet, and from experience, I’ve had older pairs come apart after getting caught in heavy rain. So while they’re great everyday shoes, they’re not built for wet weather.Still recommend them—just keep ‘em dry.
authors_reviews.author: Phil Fulch

authors_reviews.title: Great shoes
authors_reviews.text: Great shoe if you're on your feet all day. Comfortable and durable.
authors_reviews.author: Willow

authors_reviews.title: Excellent shoes
authors_reviews.text: These are great shoes if you have high arches. Much cheaper than buying at a shoe store
authors_reviews.author: G. Collector

authors_reviews.title: Was labeled as 4E but felt narrow
authors_reviews.text: I usually buy Nike Air Monarchs and have wide feet and this is not as wide on the middle part of the foot. It doesn't really fit like a 4E wide shoe should fit. It really feels like they just took the template of the regular show and added more fabric for the feet to occupy space on on the upper show but the sole and the bottom of the foot still felt narrowI went to the store after and grabbed some Nike revolution 7 in 4E and will probably grab another monarch. The New balance was not only less comfortable it was also more snug even tho it was labeled as a 4E.
authors_reviews.author: SLIZZARD
